Interface IClassSchemaEdit4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that modify an object class's Editor Tracking properties.

[Guid("7799996E-4EE7-4ABC-A553-5DA86F7A6144")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IClassSchemaEdit4 : IClassSchemaEdit3, IClassSchemaEdit2, IClassSchemaEdit

Properties

CreatedAtFieldName

Changes the field name for recording the creation time for Editor Tracking on this object class.

string CreatedAtFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreatorFieldName

Changes the field name for recording the creator for Editor Tracking on this object class.

string CreatorFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

EditedAtFieldName

Changes the field name for recording the edit time for Editor Tracking on this object class.

string EditedAtFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

EditorFieldName

Changes the field name for recording the editor for Editor Tracking on this object class.

string EditorFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsTimeInUTC

Change the property to determine Editor Tracking times are recorded in UTC.

bool IsTimeInUTC { set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet
